name: Conventions Extractor
description: Reads the codebase index and extracts a comprehensive set of team conventions, producing a day-1 conventions cheatsheet for new developers covering naming patterns, commit format, PR workflow, code review norms, test organisation, error handling style, and logging conventions.

checks.pass: Codebase index contract available — ready to extract conventions.
checks.fail: Codebase index contract not found. Cannot extract team conventions.

checks.prompt: Using the codebase index provided, extract all observable team conventions and produce a 'day-1 conventions cheatsheet'. Cover: (1) naming patterns — file names, variable names, function names, DB column names with concrete examples, (2) commit message format — prefix style, scope, tense, length limits, (3) PR workflow — branch naming, PR size norms, required reviewers, merge strategy, (4) code review norms — what reviewers check for, what is auto-approved, (5) test organisation patterns — unit vs integration separation, test file naming, fixture patterns, (6) error handling style — how errors are caught, typed, wrapped, and propagated, (7) logging conventions — log levels usage, structured logging fields, what is never logged (PII). Format as a concise cheatsheet developers can reference daily.
checks.pass: Conventions cheatsheet produced with naming patterns and commit format sections.
checks.fail: Conventions extraction incomplete — missing naming patterns or commit format.
